verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional commit for v0.25.3.1 failed-load runtime preservation, building reservation checkpoint rollback and interrupted-sleep cleanup; later documentation and manifest commits may follow it.
